programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The family is forced to take sides when Ray and Debra have a fight over a new can opener and each relates the story of what happened with radically different viewpoints.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: After an accidental tip-off from Ray which allows him to win a bet, Frank makes everyone suspicious when he begins to show an unusual interest in Ray's work.

programme.title: Coach
programme.desc: Luther believes Hayden deliberately sold him a broken-down truck and reports him to a consumer affairs watchdog.

programme.title: Coach
programme.desc: Hayden arranges a date for Kelly with his star player (Rob Youngblood).

programme.title: Coach
programme.sub-title: Any Place I Hang Myself Is Home
programme.desc: Hayden grudgingly agrees to go house hunting with Christine, then upsets her when he buys a house without consulting her.

programme.title: Coach
programme.desc: Hayden must plan a memorial for someone he barely knew because the man died and left everything to the coach.

programme.title: Coach
programme.sub-title: I Think I Can't, I Think I Can't
programme.desc: Hayden endures an excruciating train trip when Luther trades in their plane tickets following a dream about a plane crash.

programme.title: Coach
programme.desc: Hayden regrets his honesty when Christine learns how he feels about her best friend (Lee Garlington).

programme.title: Coach
programme.desc: Hayden is beaten before he plays his first bowl game when he learns the opposing coach is his former mentor.

programme.title: Coach
programme.desc: A bizarre limbo accident sidelines the team's star player prior to the Pineapple Bowl.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Fred is beside himself when his new Puerto Rican neighbor opens a competing junkyard.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Fred accidentally fires an antique gun and fears the worst when his neighbor doesn't answer.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Fred is forced to find a new partner for the junkyard when Lamont seeks employment elsewhere.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.sub-title: Sanford and Son and Sister Makes Three
programme.desc: Lamont discovers that his new fiancee may actually be his half sister.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: A bum threatens to sue Fred when he accidentally injures himself in the junkyard.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Fred invites his fiancee and a door-to-door saleswoman to dinner on the same evening.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: When Fred receives a slight injury in a car mishap, Lamont hires a housekeeper to help out.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Fred and Lamont throw a neighborhood party in an effort to raise money to pay their bills.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack plays cupid for his date's widowed father.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet tells her parents she and Jack are married.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Janet try to thwart a wealthy man's efforts to make Cindy his bride.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Fired Furley moves in with the roommates.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Larry switch apartments after Jack has an argument with the girls.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The niece of the cooking-school dean pursues Jack.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack grows suspicious when Cindy starts collecting maternity clothes.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Roper goes to a bowling banquet instead of celebrating his anniversary.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Fred invades Lena Horne's television studio dressing room during a tour of NBC.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Fred thinks that Lamont's African dress and customs are ludicrous until he hears what they include.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Fred is aghast when Lamont dates the sister of their Puerto Rican neighbor.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Lamont is upset when Fred announces that he plans to marry a young woman he has just met.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Fred is upset about Lamont spending a lot of time with Julio and ignoring him, so he tries to make his son feel guilty by discussing burial insurance with a funeral home agent.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.sub-title: Home Sweet Home for the Aged
programme.desc: Fred moves to a senior citizens home when Lamont decides to travel around the world.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Lamont gets involved in a con game when he buys what he believes is a rare antique commode.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: A 9-year-old boy begins spending all his time at the Sanford home.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: A newspaper ad leads Fred and Lamont to try out for a low-budget movie.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: A drama coach comes to the Sanford home to tutor Lamont for an acting role.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Lamont runs afoul of the stars in an astrological mix-up involving his father and Aunt Esther.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Fred witnesses a burglary at Julio's house but is too scared to identify the criminals for the police.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Lamont promotes an all-female singing trio from Philadelphia, The Three Degrees.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.sub-title: This Little TV Went to Market
programme.desc: Fred's new color television set may be the same one that was stolen from Grady.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Lamont and Rolla go into a gay bar by mistake during a night out on the town.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Lamont and Julio go into the used auto-parts business and drive Fred to Skid Row.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: New Year's Eve in the courtroom finds the judge dealing with a diapered "Mr. 1987" and an escaped convict who's trying to get to Times Square.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: A woman disrupts the court proceedings to confess to murdering her husband, while Dan decides to become a donor for a sperm bank.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Depressed over their financial problems, Mac (Charlie Robinson) decides to leave Quon Le (Denise Kumagai).

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Christine shocks her coworkers when she announces that she is getting married.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Harry and the courtroom staff have until midnight to decide 200 cases.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Dan faces the possibility of undergoing a rabies test after a stray dog bites him.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Harry and Dan try to impress Christine's friend. Guest appearance by Mel Torme.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Christine's boss (Michael Gross) is accused of sexual harassment.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Dan's wild life has finally caught up to him: he's been served a paternity suit. Bull, meanwhile, has decided to run for bailiff shop steward.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Harry tries to administer the oath of citizenship to Quon Le before she gives birth.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Through connections Mac gets advance notice about the new judges list and discovers that Christine is one of the new appointees. Meanwhile, the Wheelers return to the courtroom and buy the snack bar newsstand in the cafeteria.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: While Christine's (Markie Post) being sworn in as the new judge, Harry (Harry Anderson) plans a colossal stunt.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Christine (Markie Post) assumes her new role as a judge; Harry (Harry Anderson) prepares to launch his incredible stunt.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: While attempting to perform his stunt on the Brooklyn Bridge, Harry (Harry Anderson) is confronted by a man who intends to commit suicide. With Richard Frank and Kenneth Tigar.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Bull has a near-death experience and insists God spoke to him.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: After Roz and her boyfriend break up Christine decides to help Roz recover, so they go out together to one of Roz's favorite hang-outs: a male strip club.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie surprises the entire family with a two-week vacation in Italy, but for Ray, it's two weeks too long.
